If you find success eluding you in various pursuits, take a little ash
from the altar where VIShnu Yagya has been performed. Now get
an image of your Pitra (manes) created with the KuSha grass. Douse
it with Ganga water, put a little of the Yagya vlbhOoti (ash) on
them and offer some Prasadam while praying for yovr success.
Also chant a chapter from any religiovs text and let that 'Kusha'
imag•e floated on the flowing water. This you can also do for getting
success in any competition. You will surely succeed. When you

btahmani (wife of Brahman).
